# AcademAI - Premium AI Training Console

> AcademAI is an independent AI learning platform with free course previews and paid mastery tools for Claude AI, Claude Code, the Anthropic API, Model Context Protocol, and practical AI fluency.

AcademAI is an independent educational project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic PBC.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://academai.app/): Overview of the AcademAI learning platform.
- [Courses](https://academai.app/courses): Public catalog of AcademAI courses.
- [Learning Paths](https://academai.app/paths): Role-based roadmaps for AI foundations, Claude Code, API/cloud integrations, MCP, educators, students, and nonprofits.
- [Pricing](https://academai.app/pricing): Membership and paid mastery access information.
- [About](https://academai.app/about): Background on the AcademAI training approach.

## Course Catalog

- [Claude 101](https://academai.app/courses/claude-101): Beginner course for everyday Claude use, core features, prompting basics, work tasks, and safety practices.
- [Claude Code in Action](https://academai.app/courses/claude-code-in-action): Intermediate course for using Claude Code in development workflows.
- [Introduction to Claude Cowork](https://academai.app/courses/introduction-to-claude-cowork): Intermediate course for working with Claude on real files, projects, plugins, and workflows.
- [Introduction to Agent Skills](https://academai.app/courses/introduction-to-agent-skills): Intermediate course on reusable agent skill concepts, structure, sharing, and best practices.
- [Introduction to Subagents](https://academai.app/courses/introduction-to-subagents): Advanced course on context management, delegation, and specialized agent workflows.
- [Building with the Claude API](https://academai.app/courses/building-with-the-claude-api): Intermediate course on API requests, authentication, prompting, streaming, tools, and production practices.
- [Claude with Amazon Bedrock](https://academai.app/courses/claude-with-amazon-bedrock): Advanced course on using Claude models through AWS Bedrock.
- [Claude with Google Cloud's Vertex AI](https://academai.app/courses/claude-with-google-vertex): Advanced course on using Anthropic models through Google Cloud Vertex AI.
- [Introduction to Model Context Protocol](https://academai.app/courses/introduction-to-model-context-protocol): Intermediate course on MCP tools, resources, prompts, servers, and clients.
- [Model Context Protocol: Advanced Topics](https://academai.app/courses/model-context-protocol-advanced-topics): Advanced course on MCP sampling, notifications, file access, transport, security, and production patterns.
- [AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations](https://academai.app/courses/ai-fluency-framework-foundations): Beginner course on effective, efficient, ethical, and safe AI collaboration.
- [AI Fluency for Educators](https://academai.app/courses/ai-fluency-for-educators): Intermediate course for faculty, instructional designers, and educational leaders.
- [AI Fluency for Students](https://academai.app/courses/ai-fluency-for-students): Beginner course for AI-enhanced learning, academic success, and career planning.
- [Teaching AI Fluency](https://academai.app/courses/teaching-ai-fluency): Advanced course for teaching and assessing AI fluency.
- [AI Fluency for Nonprofits](https://academai.app/courses/ai-fluency-for-nonprofits): Beginner course for mission-driven AI use in nonprofit work.

## Access Notes

- Public pages include the homepage, course catalog, learning paths, pricing, about page, and course overview pages.
- Member-only experiences such as progress tracking, AI-generated syllabi, certificates, account pages, APIs, and paid lesson bodies should not be listed in this file unless their public access policy changes.
